content: The orthographic variant 'reflexion' (the older, less common spelling of reflection from high school vocabulary) can be framed as a 'mirror variant' that reveals an overlooked constraint for LLM self-reflection mechanisms: training LLM agents to reflect on their own outputs through the lens of 'reflexion (minor linguistic variant of the original reflection framework can improve multi-perspective self-reflection. This draws a parallel between linguistic variation in spelling and perspective variation in reasoning.
